rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior multimedia advertising studies that are largely single-brand/aggregate, and the cited paper is exactly a single-brand multimedia channel-effectiveness case study with individual-level Tobit-based elasticity estimates. Given this strong topical and methodological alignment (plus exact DOI match 10.1509/jmr.12.0241), the citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than a mere incidental mention.
